title: 'Scotland return to centre stage at last in must-win World Cup opener'
summary: Scotland prepares for its first World Cup match in 28 years, marking a major return to the tournament. The BBC coverage emphasizes the significance of this opening fixture for the team's campaign. The match represents a crucial milestone for Scottish football on the global stage.
content: BBC Scotland's chief sportswriter Tom English sets the scene from Boston as Scotland prepare for their first World Cup match in 28 years.

zh.title: 苏格兰终于回到舞台中心，世界杯揭幕战势在必赢
zh.summary: 苏格兰为28年来首次参加世界杯做准备，标志着该队重返赛事。BBC的报道强调了这场揭幕战对球队征程的重要意义。这场比赛代表了苏格兰足球在全球舞台上的一个重要里程碑。

title: The costs and challenges facing the 2026 World Cup
summary: The 2026 World Cup faces mounting challenges including extreme heat, escalating costs, environmental concerns, and travel restrictions. These logistical and financial pressures raise fundamental questions about the tournament's feasibility and sustainability. The issues could significantly impact how the competition operates.
content: The World Cup officially kicked off this week - but alongside the football, there are questions around heat, cost, the environmental impact and travel restrictions.

zh.title: 2026年世界杯面临的成本和挑战
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯面临着日益增加的挑战，包括极端炎热、成本上升、环保问题和旅行限制。这些物流和财务压力对赛事的可行性和可持续性提出了根本性问题。这些问题可能会显著影响比赛的运营方式。

title: Ancelotti confirms Neymar will miss Brazil opener
summary: Neymar has been ruled out for Brazil's opening World Cup match against Morocco due to injury, confirmed by manager Carlo Ancelotti. The absence of the star player represents a significant blow to Brazil's attacking capabilities in their opener. The setback adds pressure to the team's campaign launch.
content: Carlo Ancelotti confirms Neymar will miss Brazil's opening game of the World Cup against Morocco on Saturday.

zh.title: 安切洛蒂证实内马尔将缺席巴西揭幕战
zh.summary: 球队经理卡洛·安切洛蒂证实，内马尔因伤被排除在巴西与摩洛哥的世界杯揭幕战之外。这位明星球员的缺席对巴西在揭幕战中的进攻能力造成了重大打击。这个挫折加大了球队赛事开局的压力。

title: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 6
summary: This interactive trivia feature asks readers to identify a World Cup star based on clues provided. The guessing game invites fans to test their knowledge of tournament players. It's a light-hearted engagement piece rather than breaking news.
content: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

zh.title: 我是谁？猜世界杯明星第6号
zh.summary: 这个互动小游戏要求读者根据提供的线索识别世界杯明星。这个猜谜游戏邀请球迷测试他们对锦标赛球员的了解。这是一个轻松的互动内容，而不是突发新闻。

title: USA start World Cup in style - but will they finally join the elite?
summary: The USA, playing as World Cup hosts, delivered a dominant 4-1 victory over Paraguay in their opening match. The commanding performance signals their readiness to compete at the tournament's highest level. The win fuels debate about whether they can sustain this form and establish themselves among football's elite.
content: If there were any doubts the USA were ready to live up to the pressure of being a World Cup host, they were dispelled in a 4-1 win over Paraguay.

zh.title: 美国世界杯开局顺利——但他们最终能跻身精英行列吗？
zh.summary: 美国作为世界杯东道主，在开幕战中以4-1的压倒性优势击败巴拉圭。这场占优的比赛表明他们已准备好在锦标赛最高水平上竞争。这场胜利引发了关于他们是否能保持这种状态并在足球精英中确立自己地位的辩论。

title: Balogun stars in impressive USA win over Paraguay
summary: Forward Folarin Balogun scored twice in the USA's convincing 4-1 World Cup victory over Paraguay at LA Stadium. His two-goal performance highlighted the team's attacking strength on home soil. Balogun's contributions set the tone for a decisive opening display.
content: Folarin Balogun scores twice as the USA begin their World Cup campaign with a convincing 4-1 victory over Paraguay at the Los Angeles Stadium.

zh.title: 巴洛贡在美国对巴拉圭的亮眼胜利中表现出色
zh.summary: 前锋福拉林·巴洛贡在美国于洛杉矶体育场对巴拉圭的4-1世界杯胜利中打进两球。他的两球表现凸显了球队在主场的进攻威力。巴洛贡的贡献为这场决定性的开幕表现奠定了基调。

title: VAR makes 'mistaken identity' history as strange booking confuses fans
summary: A bizarre VAR incident during the USA-Paraguay match involved a mistaken identity that resulted in a confusing booking. The unusual sequence of events bewildered spectators and commentators throughout the broadcast. The incident highlighted an extraordinary moment in the tournament's opening days.
content: The United States open their World Cup campaign with a fine win - but not before  a sequence of events that left everyone scratching their heads.

zh.title: VAR制造"误认身份"历史，离奇禁赛令粉丝困惑
zh.summary: 美国对巴拉圭比赛中发生的荒诞VAR事件涉及误认身份，导致令人困惑的禁赛。事件的不寻常序列在整个转播过程中让观众和评论员困惑。这一事件突显了赛事开赛初期的非凡时刻。

title: Balogun scores stunner as USA run riot
summary: Folarin Balogun netted his second goal early in the second half as the USA dominated Paraguay in their World Cup opener. His clinical finishing exemplified the team's attacking potency throughout the match. The goals underscored why the hosts are considered serious tournament contenders.
content: Folarin Balogun scores his second and USA's third goal before half-time in their opening game of the 2026 World Cup against Paraguay.

zh.title: 巴洛贡打入精彩一球，美国大胜巴拉圭
zh.summary: 在美国世界杯首场比赛中，福拉林·巴洛贡在下半场早期打入第二球，美国队主宰了对巴拉圭的比赛。他冷静的射门完美展现了球队在整场比赛中的进攻威力。这些进球证明了东道主为何被视为赛事的有力竞争者。

title: England have training equipment stolen
summary: England's training equipment was stolen before the team's arrival in Kansas City ahead of their World Cup fixtures. The theft disrupts the team's pre-match preparation schedule. The incident raises concerns about security and logistics at the tournament.
content: England are victims of a theft of their training equipment before their arrival in Kansas City on Saturday.

zh.title: 英格兰训练装备被盗
zh.summary: 英格兰队训练装备在球队抵达堪萨斯城前世界杯前夕被盗。这起盗窃事件打乱了球队的赛前准备计划。这一事件引发了对赛事安全和后勤的担忧。

title: Katy Perry, Tyla & Future among performers at USA's opening ceremony
summary: The 2026 World Cup opening ceremony at SoFi Stadium featured performances from Katy Perry, Tyla, and Future among other artists. The high-profile entertainment lineup showcased the tournament's global star power and spectacle. The ceremony set an elaborate tone for the month-long competition.
content: Katy Perry, Tyla and Future are among the performers at USA's star-studded World Cup opening ceremony at SoFi Stadium Stadium.

zh.title: 凯蒂·佩里、Tyla和Future等艺术家参加美国世界杯开幕式
zh.summary: 2026年世界杯开幕式在SoFi体育场举行，凯蒂·佩里、Tyla和Future等艺术家进行了精彩演出。这一高端娱乐阵容展现了赛事的全球明星号召力和盛大场面。开幕式为这个月的赛事拉开了宏大的序幕。
